Bash(./venv/bin/python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'src/python'\)
from config import load_settings
import os
os.environ['DEMO_MODE'] = 'true'
s = load_settings\(\)
print\(f'demo_mode = {s.demo_mode}'\)
assert s.demo_mode is True

from agents.tactical_planner import TacticalPlannerAgent
tp = TacticalPlannerAgent\(\)
from mission_data.asset_registry import get_available_effectors
coas = tp._generate_coas_heuristic\(
    target_data={'lat': 45.0, 'lon': 26.0, 'type': 'SAM'},
    assets=get_available_effectors\(\),
\)
print\(f'Generated {len\(coas\)} COAs'\)
for c in coas:
    print\(f'  {c.id}: {c.effector_name} Pk={c.pk_estimate:.0%} TTE={c.time_to_effect_min:.1f}m'\)
print\('Demo pipeline verified OK'\)
")
